cause_analysis.narrative: Hair by Chloe Neal churned on 2026-02-13 after 238 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-14 via app_chat — 30 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 30 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-12 via app_chat, client wrote: "So I wamt to cancel and the meeting this morning had nothing to do with that. I want my account canceled by the end of t…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Hi Chloe, I do understand your frustration. Please allow me a day’s time, until tomorrow morning. I will be picking this up on priority and will have a word with my Client Experience Head. I'm so sorry for the delay and the inconvenience over here.

I dont think you’re understanding. I wamt it canceled now. Im all done waiting for anything from you guys. It was supposed to be canceled this morning during our call and you guys figured a way to not do that. Im annoyed and I want it done
Thank you so much
Hey Chloe, I am so sorry for the delay and the frustration caused. I will go ahead and offboard your account. However, you are always welcome to come back, and I wish you success with your business.
No worries Chloe! Wish you all the best for your business. :)
So I wamt to cancel and the meeting this morning had nothing to do with that. I want my account canceled by the end of the day please

Good Morning Chloe, Happy Wednesday!  We're halfway through the week already! Hope your books are looking good and your clients are leaving happy. Keep up the great work, and if there's anything I can help with, I'm just a text away.  Have a productive rest of the week!
I completely understand, and I respect your decision.
Ok Wednesday morning at 9:30am
Sure!! Thank you and I am sorry again.
Ok I can do Wednesday

One thing that stood out to me that you mentioned you've been shifting your focus more towards spray tanning and stepping back a bit from the salon side. That actually makes a big difference in how we should be targeting things. Right now, the keywords and strategy may still be geared more towards salon services, so wh…

Before we wrap things up, we do have a quick off-boarding call as part of our process, it's really just to make sure we transfer all your access and data back to you smoothly, so nothing gets lost on your end.

I genuinely want to make this right for you. Before we go ahead with cancelling, I'd love the chance to hop on a quick call so I can really understand where things stand and figure out what needs to change.
Would you be open to a quick call so we can get this sorted? Here's my calendar link if that's easier: https://calendly.com/tanvi-m-zoca/zoca-call
May I know the time please.
No I don’t think I wanna talk about it anymore. Id like to cancel
Alright Chloe!!
I just saw that you have declined the meeting for an off boarding call with us. I am so sorry to schedule it for today. I have rescheduled it for Wednesday 9:30 AM PST.
Perfect. Yes I declined because it was for today. I will talk to you guys tomorrow
Hey Chloe, Good Morning! How have you been?

It'll take about 15–20 minutes, and you'll be speaking with our Client Experience lead. I want to be upfront, this isn't a sales pitch, and no one's going to try to change your mind. It's simply a chance for us to understand your experience, make sure the transition is seamless, and honestly, even if we're parting ways…
Hey Chloe,  I completely hear you, and I'm not going to pretend otherwise. You are right, you haven't seen the results you should be seeing since January 20th, and that's not okay.
I really do want to see this work for you, Chloe.

Hey Chloe! Hope your week's off to a good start.  Just a quick thought- February is honestly one of the best months for building loyal clients. People searching for “blow dry near me" right now? They're not just one-timers. A lot of them turn into regulars through spring if the experience is right. And yours always is.…
Hi, I need you to send me a link so I can cancel This isn’t working out for me. I literally have not gotten one inquiry in the last six weeks.

Good morning Chloe!  As you wrap up the week, remember this: in the beauty and wellness industry, your reputation compounds. Every great client experience this week creates reviews, referrals, and repeat bookings for next month. You're not just working day-to-day - you're building long-term growth.  Hope you finish str…
